zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mint於1518年出生在英國藍卡爾賀斯金時，他的父親Sir William Fleetwood a Knight26歲，母親Helena Standish33歲。他於1540年與Barbara Francis在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1564年住在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 基路士。他去世於1570年11月21日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年52歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mint于1518年出生在英国藍卡爾賀斯金时，他的父亲Sir William Fleetwood a Knight26岁，母亲Helena Standish33岁。他于1540年与Barbara Francis在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1564年住在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 基路士。他去世于1570年11月21日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年52岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: Fleetwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost place called with Old English flēot ‘stream, estuary’ + wudu ‘wood’, possibly in or near Kirkby in Walton, Lancashire. The existing Fleetwood, Lancashire acquired its name in the 19th century from its founder, Sir Peter Hesketh Fleetwood, and is not the source of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mint was born in 1518, in Heskin, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir William Fleetwood a Knight, was 26 and his mother, Helena Standish, was 33. He married Barbara Francis in 1540, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom in 1564. He died on 21 November 1570, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mint est né en 1518, à Heskin, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Fleetwood a Knight, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Helena Standish, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Francis en 1540, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1564. Il est décédé le 21 novembre 1570, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mint 1518 in Heskin, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Fleetwood a Knight 26 und seine Mutter Helena Standish 33. Er hat 1540 in London, Middlesex, England Barbara Francis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1564 hat er in Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 21. November 1570 im Alter von 52 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mint è nato il nel 1518 nel Heskin, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Fleetwood a Knight, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Helena Standish, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Barbara Francis nel 1540, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1564. Morì il 21 novembre 1570, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mintが1518年にイギリスランカシュアイアヘスキンで生まれた時，父Sir William Fleetwood a Knightは26歳，母Helena Standishは33歳であった。1540年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでBarbara Francisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1564年にはイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチャルフォント スト ギレスに住んでいた。彼は1570年11月21日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで52歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアチャルフォント スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.Poulton Le Fylde, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 파우턴 일 피드
ko.Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 차폰트 스트 자일스
ko.Vache manor, Chalfont St Giles, Buckingh: 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 차폰트 스트 자일스 스트 길스' c후르치
ko.Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 차폰트 스트 자일스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mint(이)가 1518년 영국 랭카실르 헤스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Fleetwood a Knight(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Helena Standish(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1540년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Barbara Francis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1564년도에 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 차폰트 스트 자일스에서 살았다. 그는 1570년 11월 21일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 차폰트 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Engl: Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom

pt.Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Engl: Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mint nasceu em 1518, em Heskin, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Fleetwood a Knight, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Helena Standish, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Francis em 1540, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1564. Ele faleceu em 21 de novembro de 1570, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Engl: халфонт ст джилесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Vache manor, Chalfont St Giles, Buckingh: ст джилес' чурч, халфонт ст джилесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Engl: халфонт ст джилесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mint родился в 1518 г. в местности хескин, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Fleetwood a Knight было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Helena Standish, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Francis в 1540 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности халфонт ст джилесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1564 году. Он умер 21 ноября 1570 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности халфонт ст питир, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Fleetwood Master Royal Mint nació en 1518, en Heskin, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Fleetwood a Knight, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Helena Standish, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Barbara Francis en 1540, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Chalfont St Giles, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1564. Murió el 21 de noviembre de 1570, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
